evals.prompt: Create a company sheet for NVIDIA in Notion.
evals.expected_output: A Notion page for NVIDIA with all required sections (Revenue, Rank, About, Clients, Benefits, Competitors, Glassdoor, Links).
expectations: The page lists at least 3 competitors
The page is created in Notion

evals.prompt: Research Stripe and create a profile sheet in Notion.
evals.expected_output: A Notion page for Stripe with all required sections.
expectations: The page identifies Stripe as a Fintech/Payments company
The page lists key clients like Amazon or Shopify
The page includes a link to Stripe Careers
